name: THBKG
description: The Temporal Heterogeneous Biomedical Knowledge Graph (THBKG): a biomedical knowledge graph where every edge is dated by the year its evidence first appeared, enabling leak-free as-of queries at any historical decision point. Built from Open Targets 26.03, Reactome, ChEMBL, and ClinicalTrials.gov. Ships a clinical-advancement benchmark in which each target-disease pair is scored only from evidence datable strictly before its Phase II transition year. Stats: 110,396 nodes (target, disease, molecule, Gene Ontology term, Reactome pathway); ~11.1M edges over nineteen relations (sixteen temporal, three static); 28,795 advancement labels split temporally into 21,602 train / 7,193 eval pairs (w3 window).
citeAs: Siu, Cabrera, Mudaliar, and Zubiaga. THBKG: A Temporal Biomedical Knowledge Graph for Leak-Free Clinical Advancement Prediction.

creator.name: Queen Mary University of London; Recursion Pharmaceuticals

distribution.name: github-repo
distribution.description: THBKG source repository: construction pipeline, benchmark splits, and evaluation harness.

distribution.name: hetero-graph
distribution.description: PyTorch-Geometric HeteroData object: the assembled temporal heterogeneous graph with node features and dated, feature-carrying edges (26.03, w3 advancement labels).

distribution.name: train-split
distribution.description: Advancement labels for the training set (pairs entering Phase II 1995-2015).

distribution.name: eval-split
distribution.description: Advancement labels for the held-out evaluation set (pairs entering Phase II 2016-2021; w3 window). N=7,193, 9.29% positive.

recordSet.name: advancement_labels_train
recordSet.description: Training advancement labels: one row per target-disease pair entering Phase II in 1995-2015.

field.name: target_id
field.description: Ensembl gene identifier of the target.

field.name: transition_year
field.description: Year the pair entered Phase II; the decision date at which the pair is scored on evidence dated strictly before it.

field.name: outcome
field.description: True if a Phase III trial for the same target-disease pair was registered within three years of Phase II entry, else False.

recordSet.name: advancement_labels_eval
recordSet.description: Held-out evaluation advancement labels (w3 window): one row per target-disease pair entering Phase II in 2016-2021. N=7,193, 9.29% positive.

field.name: target_id
field.description: Ensembl gene identifier of the target.

field.name: transition_year
field.description: Year the pair entered Phase II; the decision date at which the pair is scored on evidence dated strictly before it.

field.name: outcome
field.description: True if a Phase III trial for the same target-disease pair was registered within three years of Phase II entry, else False.
